claim_letter_body_1: We would like to remind you that invoice number {invoiceNo} issued on {date} related to the amount of {amount} SAR ({amountText}) was supposed to be paid by __________ and until the date of this letter, the invoice amount has not been received.
claim_letter_body_2: Therefore, we request you to pay the due amount within 7 days from its date, through the bank account attached to the invoice.
claim_letter_body_3: In case of non-payment within the specified period, we will unfortunately be forced to take the necessary legal measures to collect the dues.
